system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against TN 6
Type: Normal, Counter
Qi: 1

Your fingertips turn a shimmering blue and grow luminous points. When these strike an enemy, they draw the victim’s life force into you, healing yourself as it harms the foe. But this comes at a heavy price. On a success you grow sharp blue claws. On a Successful Attack roll, every two Wounds you do, you gain back 1 Wound. The claws themselves do 4d10 Damage. You can use the claws for one Attack, then they dissipate. The amount of Wounds you heal need to be tracked every month. For every three Wounds you heal, you must kill one person. If you do not the Five Ghosts will come and attack someone you care about or need. Cathartic: You gain back 1 Wound for every Wound you cause. You can use the claws for 3 Attacks, then they dissipate.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: You gain back 1 Wound for every Wound you cause. You can use the claws for 3 Attacks, then they dissipate.
